storage_auth_failed: Storage authentication failed. Check the configured access credentials
storage_permission_denied: The storage backend denied this operation. Check its permissions
storage_misconfigured: The storage configuration is invalid or incomplete. Check the connection settings
storage_not_found: The target storage resource does not exist or has already been removed
storage_rate_limited: The storage backend is rate limiting requests. Try again shortly
storage_transient_failure: The storage backend is temporarily unavailable. Try again later
storage_precondition_failed: The storage operation precondition failed. Refresh and try again
storage_operation_unsupported: This storage backend does not support the requested operation
policy_storage_access_key_required: Access key is required for this storage policy
policy_storage_secret_key_required: Secret key is required for this storage policy
policy_storage_bucket_required: Bucket is required for this storage policy
policy_storage_endpoint_invalid: The storage endpoint or bucket format is invalid
policy_remote_node_required: Select a remote node before saving this remote storage policy
policy_remote_node_unexpected: Remote node can only be used by remote storage policies
policy_remote_storage_target_required: Select a remote storage target before saving this remote storage policy
policy_remote_node_disabled: The selected remote node is disabled
policy_remote_node_base_url_required: The selected direct remote node needs a base URL before it can be used by a storage policy
policy_remote_node_transfer_strategy_uns: This remote node does not support presigned browser transfer strategies. Use relay streaming instead
policy_onedrive_options_unsupported: OneDrive options can only be used with OneDrive storage policies
policy_onedrive_account_mode_required: Select a OneDrive account mode before saving this storage policy
policy_onedrive_personal_china_cloud_uns: Personal Microsoft accounts must use the Global Microsoft Graph cloud
policy_onedrive_sharepoint_site_required: SharePoint site mode needs a Site ID unless a Drive ID is already set
policy_onedrive_group_required: Group drive mode needs a Group ID unless a Drive ID is already set
policy_native_thumbnail_unsupported: Storage-native thumbnail processing is not supported by this policy driver
policy_native_media_metadata_unsupported: Storage-native media metadata processing is not supported by this policy driver
policy_promotion_source_unsupported: Only generic S3-compatible storage policies can be promoted
policy_promotion_target_unsupported: This storage policy cannot be promoted to the selected target driver
policy_promotion_bucket_change_denied: Changing the bucket while promoting this storage policy is not allowed
